2026-05-26T18:58:56.3133956Z /usr/local/python3.11.14/lib/python3.11/site-packages/torch_npu/contrib/transfer_to_npu.py:347: ImportWarning: 
2026-05-26T18:58:56.3134712Z     *************************************************************************************************************
2026-05-26T18:58:56.3135409Z     The torch.Tensor.cuda and torch.nn.Module.cuda are replaced with torch.Tensor.npu and torch.nn.Module.npu now..
2026-05-26T18:58:56.3136289Z     The torch.cuda.DoubleTensor is replaced with torch.npu.FloatTensor cause the double type is not supported now..
2026-05-26T18:58:56.3137006Z     The backend in torch.distributed.init_process_group set to hccl now..

2026-05-26T19:40:25.3833977Z     *************************************************************************************************************
2026-05-26T19:40:25.3834632Z     The torch.Tensor.cuda and torch.nn.Module.cuda are replaced with torch.Tensor.npu and torch.nn.Module.npu now..
2026-05-26T19:40:25.3835545Z     The torch.cuda.DoubleTensor is replaced with torch.npu.FloatTensor cause the double type is not supported now..
2026-05-26T19:40:25.3836225Z     The backend in torch.distributed.init_process_group set to hccl now..
